text:
Visit a Patient | Contra Costa Health
Hospital Address
2500 Alhambra Ave.
Martinez, CA 94553
MAP
Main Phone Number
925-370-5000
We are open 24 hours a day
We make the hospital accessible 24 hours a day to family and loved ones of those receiving care in the medical center. Everyone—including minors under adult supervision—can be with loved ones any time of the day or night at our hospital. We do ask that people check in at the front desk before seeing a patient.
Visiting Hours
24 hours a day, 7 days a week
Quiet time: 10 p.m. – 7 a.m.
Parking
Parking is free for visitors in designated areas. We also offer a free valet service from 10 a.m. – 4 p.m.
Food
Cafeteria: The hospital's cafeteria serves breakfast, lunch and dinner at affordable prices.
Gift shop
: Snacks and bottled water are available. Located on the 1st floor.
Vending machines are located in the 1st floor lobby
